revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 那須温泉神社 |画像={{画像募集中|cat=那須町}} |所在地 = [[栃木県]][[那須町]]湯本182 |地図 = |祭神 = [[大国主|大己貴命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少彦名命]]、[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''那須温泉神社'''（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須町]]の[[神社]]。
== 概要 == 古くは、貞観11年(869年）に従四位上を授けられ、『[[延喜式]]』の神名帳にも名が見えている。[[平安時代]]の末期、[[屋島の戦い]]の際には、[[那須与一]]が扇の的を射るに当たり、「南無八幡大菩薩、別しては吾が国の神明、日光権現宇都宮、那須温泉大明神、願わくはあの扇の真中射させてたばえ給え」と那須温泉神社を祈願して見事に扇を射たため、与一は名声を轟かして、[[那須郡]]の総領となり、凱旋の後その神恩の深いことを謝して、大社殿を寄進し、鏑矢、蟇目矢、征矢、桧扇、鳥居を奉納した。領民はこぞって温泉神社を勧請し、[[貞享]]3年（[[1686年]]）6月19日には正一位に叙せられた<ref>{{Cite web |url= http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ |title= 宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=那須温泉神社 |accessdate=2022-2-23}}</ref>。
神社後方には、[[玉藻前]]が石化したものであると伝わる[[殺生石]]がある。
== 境内社 == : '''愛宕社''' 祭神 - [[火産霊命]] : '''見立神社''' 祭神 - [[天児屋根命]]、狩野三郎行広 : '''祖霊社''' : '''琴平神社''' : '''疱瘡神社''' : '''神明社''' : '''山神社''' : '''稚祇神社''' : '''天満天神''' 祭神 - [[菅原道真公]] : '''九尾稲荷神社''' 祭神 - [[九尾の狐]]（[[玉藻前]]）
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == *[[殺生石]] *[[九尾の狐]] *[[玉藻前]]
== 外部リンク == * [http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ 那須温泉神社]
{{神道 横}} {{Normdaten}}
{{デフォルトソート:なすゆぜん}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:栃木県の式内社]] [[Category:温泉神社]] [[Category:那須町の歴史]] [[Category:那須町の建築物]]

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 那須温泉神社 |画像={{画像募集中|cat=那須町}} |所在地 = [[栃木県]][[那須町]]湯本182 |地図 = |祭神 = [[大国主|大己貴命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少彦名命]]、[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''那須温泉神社'''（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須町]]の[[神社]]。
== 概要 == 古くは、[[貞観]]11年([[869年]]）に従四位上を授けられ、『[[延喜式]]』の神名帳にも名が見えている。[[平安時代]]の末期、[[屋島の戦い]]の際には、[[那須与一]]が扇の的を射るに当たり、「南無八幡大菩薩、別しては吾が国の神明、日光権現宇都宮、那須温泉大明神、願わくはあの扇の真中射させてたばえ給え」と那須温泉神社を祈願して見事に扇を射たため、与一は名声を轟かして、[[那須郡]]の総領となり、凱旋の後その神恩の深いことを謝して、大社殿を寄進し、鏑矢、蟇目矢、征矢、桧扇、鳥居を奉納した。領民はこぞって温泉神社を勧請し、[[貞享]]3年（[[1686年]]）6月19日には正一位に叙せられた<ref>{{Cite web |url= http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ |title= 宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=那須温泉神社 |accessdate=2022-2-23}}</ref>。
神社後方には、[[玉藻前]]が石化したものであると伝わる[[殺生石]]がある。
== 境内社 == : '''愛宕社''' 祭神 - [[火産霊命]] : '''見立神社''' 祭神 - [[天児屋根命]]、狩野三郎行広 : '''祖霊社''' : '''琴平神社''' : '''疱瘡神社''' : '''神明社''' : '''山神社''' : '''稚祇神社''' : '''天満天神''' 祭神 - [[菅原道真公]] : '''九尾稲荷神社''' 祭神 - [[九尾の狐]]（[[玉藻前]]）
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == *[[殺生石]] *[[九尾の狐]] *[[玉藻前]]
== 外部リンク == * [http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ 那須温泉神社]

revision.comment: /* 概要 */ 少し追記。
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 那須温泉神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Nasu Yuzen Shrine from Sessho-seki area.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]湯本182 |地図 = |祭神 = [[大国主|大己貴命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少彦名命]]、[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''那須温泉神社'''（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]の[[神社]]。
== 概要 == [[舒明天皇]]の代（在位：[[629年]] - [[641年]]）の創建と伝わる<ref name="jre">{{cite web|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=那須温泉神社（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）|publisher=[[東日本旅客鉄道]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref>。古くは、[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]11年（[[869年]]）に[[従四位上]]を授けられ、『[[延喜式]]』の[[延喜式神名帳|神名帳]]にも名が見えている。[[平安時代]]の末期、[[屋島の戦い]]の際には、[[那須与一]]が扇の的を射るに当たり、「南無[[八幡大菩薩]]、別しては吾が国の神明、[[日光二荒山神社|日光権現]][[宇都宮二荒山神社|宇都宮]]、那須温泉大明神、願わくはあの扇の真中射させてたばえ給え」と那須温泉神社を祈願して見事に扇を射たため、与一は名声を轟かして、[[那須郡]]の総領となり、凱旋の後その神恩の深いことを謝して、大社殿を寄進し、鏑矢、蟇目矢、征矢、桧扇、鳥居を奉納した。領民はこぞって温泉神社を勧請し、[[貞享]]3年（[[1686年]]）6月19日には[[正一位]]に叙せられた<ref>{{Cite web |url= http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ |title= 宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=那須温泉神社 |accessdate=2022-2-23}}</ref>。与一にあやかり、必勝祈願に訪れる人が多い<ref name="jre"/>。
境内には、与一が奉献した三之鳥居、[[水琴窟]]、[[さざれ石]]などがある<ref name="jre"/>。
神社後方には、[[玉藻前]]が石化したものであると伝わる[[殺生石]]がある。

{{神社 |名称 = 那須温泉神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Nasu Yuzen Shrine from Sessho-seki area.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]湯本182 |地図 = |祭神 = [[大国主|大己貴命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少彦名命]]、[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''那須温泉神社'''（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]の[[神社]]。
== 概要 == [[舒明天皇]]の代（在位：[[629年]] - [[641年]]）の創建と伝わる<ref name="jre">{{cite web|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=那須温泉神社（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）|publisher=[[東日本旅客鉄道]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref>。古くは、[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]11年（[[869年]]）に[[従四位上]]を授けられ、『[[延喜式]]』の[[延喜式神名帳|神名帳]]にも名が見えている。[[平安時代]]の末期、[[屋島の戦い]]の際には、[[那須与一]]が扇の的を射るに当たり、「南無[[八幡大菩薩]]、別しては吾が国の神明、[[日光二荒山神社|日光権現]][[宇都宮二荒山神社|宇都宮]]、那須温泉大明神、願わくはあの扇の真中射させてたばえ給え」と那須温泉神社を祈願して見事に扇を射たため、与一は名声を轟かして、[[那須郡]]の総領となり、凱旋の後その神恩の深いことを謝して、大社殿を寄進し、鏑矢、蟇目矢、征矢、桧扇、鳥居を奉納した。領民はこぞって温泉神社を勧請し、[[貞享]]3年（[[1686年]]）6月19日には[[正一位]]に叙せられた<ref>{{Cite web |url= http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ |title= 宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=那須温泉神社 |accessdate=2022-2-23}}</ref>。与一にあやかり、必勝祈願に訪れる人が多い<ref name="jre"/>。
境内には、与一が奉献した三之鳥居、[[水琴窟]]、[[さざれ石]]などがある<ref name="jre"/>。

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 那須温泉神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Nasuyuzen.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]湯本182 |地図 = |祭神 = [[大国主|大己貴命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少彦名命]]、[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''那須温泉神社'''（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]の[[神社]]。
== 概要 == [[舒明天皇]]の代（在位：[[629年]] - [[641年]]）の創建と伝わる<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=那須温泉神社（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）|publisher=[[東日本旅客鉄道]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref>。古くは、[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]11年（[[869年]]）に[[従四位上]]を授けられ、『[[延喜式]]』の[[延喜式神名帳|神名帳]]にも名が見えている。[[平安時代]]の末期、[[屋島の戦い]]の際には、[[那須与一]]が扇の的を射るに当たり、「南無[[八幡大菩薩]]、別しては吾が国の神明、[[日光二荒山神社|日光権現]][[宇都宮二荒山神社|宇都宮]]、那須温泉大明神、願わくはあの扇の真中射させてたばえ給え」と那須温泉神社を祈願して見事に扇を射たため、与一は名声を轟かして、[[那須郡]]の総領となり、凱旋の後その神恩の深いことを謝して、大社殿を寄進し、鏑矢、蟇目矢、征矢、桧扇、鳥居を奉納した。領民はこぞって温泉神社を勧請し、[[貞享]]3年（[[1686年]]）6月19日には[[正一位]]に叙せられた<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url= http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ |title= 宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=那須温泉神社 |accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref>。与一にあやかり、必勝祈願に訪れる人が多い<ref name="jre"/>。
境内には、与一が奉献した三之鳥居、[[水琴窟]]、[[さざれ石]]などがある<ref name="jre"/>。
神社後方には、[[玉藻前]]が石化したものであると伝わる[[殺生石]]がある{{要出典|date=2022年3月}}。
== 境内社 == : '''愛宕社''' 祭神 - [[カグツチ|火産霊命]] : '''見立神社''' 祭神 - [[天児屋命|天児屋根命]]、狩野三郎行広 : '''祖霊社''' : '''琴平神社''' : '''疱瘡神社''' : '''神明社''' : '''山神社''' : '''稚祇神社''' : '''天満天神''' 祭神 - [[菅原道真|菅原道真公]] : '''九尾稲荷神社''' 祭神 - [[九尾の狐]]（[[玉藻前]]） <gallery widths="200"> ファイル:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|見立神社 ファイル:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|祖霊社 ファイル:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|九尾稲荷神社 </gallery> == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == *[[殺生石]] *[[九尾の狐]] *[[玉藻前]]
== 外部リンク == * [http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ 那須温泉神社]

{{デフォルトソート:なすゆせんしんしや}} [[Category:栃木県の神社]] [[Category:下野国の式内社]] [[Category:温泉神社]] [[Category:那須町の建築物]] [[Category:那須町の歴史]] [[Category:那須与一]]

== 概要 == [[舒明天皇]]の代（在位：[[629年]] - [[641年]]）の創建と伝わる<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=那須温泉神社（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）|publisher=[[東日本旅客鉄道]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref>。古くは、[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]11年（[[869年]]）に[[従四位上]]を授けられ、『[[延喜式]]』の[[延喜式神名帳|神名帳]]にも名が見えている。[[平安時代]]の末期、[[屋島の戦い]]の際には、[[那須与一]]が扇の的を射るに当たり、「南無[[八幡大菩薩]]、別しては吾が国の神明、[[日光二荒山神社|日光権現]][[宇都宮二荒山神社|宇都宮]]、那須温泉大明神、願わくはあの扇の真中射させてたばえ給え」と那須温泉神社を祈願して見事に扇を射たため、与一は名声を轟かして、[[那須郡]]の総領となり、凱旋の後その神恩の深いことを謝して、大社殿を寄進し、鏑矢、蟇目矢、征矢、桧扇、鳥居を奉納した。領民はこぞって温泉神社を勧請し、[[貞享]]3年（[[1686年]]）6月19日には[[正一位]]に叙せられた<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url= http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ |title= 宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=那須温泉神社 |accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref>。与一にあやかり、必勝祈願に訪れる人が多い<ref name="jre"/>。
境内には、与一が奉献した三之鳥居、[[水琴窟]]、[[さざれ石]]などがある<ref name="jre"/>。
神社後方には、[[玉藻前]]が石化したものであると伝わる[[殺生石]]がある{{要出典|date=2022年3月}}。
== 境内社 == : '''愛宕社''' 祭神 - [[カグツチ|火産霊命]] : '''見立神社''' 祭神 - [[天児屋命|天児屋根命]]、狩野三郎行広 : '''祖霊社''' : '''琴平神社''' : '''疱瘡神社''' : '''神明社''' : '''山神社''' : '''稚祇神社''' : '''天満天神''' 祭神 - [[菅原道真|菅原道真公]] : '''九尾稲荷神社''' 祭神 - [[九尾の狐]]（[[玉藻前]]） <gallery widths="200"> ファイル:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|見立神社 ファイル:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|祖霊社 ファイル:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|九尾稲荷神社 </gallery> == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == *[[殺生石]] *[[九尾の狐]] *[[玉藻前]]
== 外部リンク == * [http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ 那須温泉神社]

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 那須温泉神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = [[ファイル:Nasuyuzen.jpg|250px]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]湯本182 |地図 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|deity = [[大国主|大己貴命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少彦名命]]、[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }} '''那須温泉神社'''（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]の[[神社]]。
== 概要 == [[舒明天皇]]の代（在位：[[629年]] - [[641年]]）の創建と伝わる<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=那須温泉神社（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）|publisher=[[東日本旅客鉄道]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref>。古くは、[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]11年（[[869年]]）に[[従四位上]]を授けられ、『[[延喜式]]』の[[延喜式神名帳|神名帳]]にも名が見えている。[[平安時代]]の末期、[[屋島の戦い]]の際には、[[那須与一]]が扇の的を射るに当たり、「南無[[八幡大菩薩]]、別しては吾が国の神明、[[日光二荒山神社|日光権現]][[宇都宮二荒山神社|宇都宮]]、那須温泉大明神、願わくはあの扇の真中射させてたばえ給え」と那須温泉神社を祈願して見事に扇を射たため、与一は名声を轟かして、[[那須郡]]の総領となり、凱旋の後その神恩の深いことを謝して、大社殿を寄進し、鏑矢、蟇目矢、征矢、桧扇、鳥居を奉納した。領民はこぞって温泉神社を勧請し、[[貞享]]3年（[[1686年]]）6月19日には[[正一位]]に叙せられた<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url= http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ |title= 宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=那須温泉神社 |accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref>。与一にあやかり、必勝祈願に訪れる人が多い<ref name="jre"/>。
境内には、与一が奉献した三之鳥居、[[水琴窟]]、[[さざれ石]]などがある<ref name="jre"/>。
神社後方には、[[玉藻前]]が石化したものであると伝わる[[殺生石]]がある{{要出典|date=2022年3月}}。
== 境内社 == : '''愛宕社''' 祭神 - [[カグツチ|火産霊命]] : '''見立神社''' 祭神 - [[天児屋命|天児屋根命]]、狩野三郎行広 : '''祖霊社''' : '''琴平神社''' : '''疱瘡神社''' : '''神明社''' : '''山神社''' : '''稚祇神社''' : '''天満天神''' 祭神 - [[菅原道真|菅原道真公]] : '''九尾稲荷神社''' 祭神 - [[九尾の狐]]（[[玉藻前]]） <gallery widths="200"> ファイル:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|見立神社 ファイル:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|祖霊社 ファイル:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|九尾稲荷神社 </gallery> == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == *[[殺生石]] *[[九尾の狐]] *[[玉藻前]]
== 外部リンク == * [http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ 那須温泉神社]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== 外部リンク ==" to "== External Links =="
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 那須温泉神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = [[ファイル:Nasuyuzen.jpg|250px]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]湯本182 |地図 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|deity = [[大国主|大己貴命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少彦名命]]、[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }} '''那須温泉神社'''（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]の[[神社]]。
== Overview == [[舒明天皇]]の代（在位：[[629年]] - [[641年]]）の創建と伝わる<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=那須温泉神社（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）|publisher=[[東日本旅客鉄道]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref>。古くは、[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]11年（[[869年]]）に[[従四位上]]を授けられ、『[[延喜式]]』の[[延喜式神名帳|神名帳]]にも名が見えている。[[平安時代]]の末期、[[屋島の戦い]]の際には、[[那須与一]]が扇の的を射るに当たり、「南無[[八幡大菩薩]]、別しては吾が国の神明、[[日光二荒山神社|日光権現]][[宇都宮二荒山神社|宇都宮]]、那須温泉大明神、願わくはあの扇の真中射させてたばえ給え」と那須温泉神社を祈願して見事に扇を射たため、与一は名声を轟かして、[[那須郡]]の総領となり、凱旋の後その神恩の深いことを謝して、大社殿を寄進し、鏑矢、蟇目矢、征矢、桧扇、鳥居を奉納した。領民はこぞって温泉神社を勧請し、[[貞享]]3年（[[1686年]]）6月19日には[[正一位]]に叙せられた<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url= http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ |title= 宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=那須温泉神社 |accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref>。与一にあやかり、必勝祈願に訪れる人が多い<ref name="jre"/>。
境内には、与一が奉献した三之鳥居、[[水琴窟]]、[[さざれ石]]などがある<ref name="jre"/>。
神社後方には、[[玉藻前]]が石化したものであると伝わる[[殺生石]]がある{{要出典|date=2022年3月}}。
== 境内社 == : '''愛宕社''' 祭神 - [[カグツチ|火産霊命]] : '''見立神社''' 祭神 - [[天児屋命|天児屋根命]]、狩野三郎行広 : '''祖霊社''' : '''琴平神社''' : '''疱瘡神社''' : '''神明社''' : '''山神社''' : '''稚祇神社''' : '''天満天神''' 祭神 - [[菅原道真|菅原道真公]] : '''九尾稲荷神社''' 祭神 - [[九尾の狐]]（[[玉藻前]]） <gallery widths="200"> ファイル:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|見立神社 ファイル:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|祖霊社 ファイル:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|九尾稲荷神社 </gallery> == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== See Also == *[[殺生石]] *[[九尾の狐]] *[[玉藻前]]

{{神社 |名称 = 那須温泉神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = [[File:Nasuyuzen.jpg|250px]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]湯本182 |地図 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|deity = [[大国主|大己貴命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少彦名命]]、[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }} '''那須温泉神社'''（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]の[[神社]]。
== Overview == [[舒明天皇]]の代（在位：[[629]] - [[641]]）の創建と伝わる<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=那須温泉神社（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）|publisher=[[東日本旅客鉄道]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref>。古くは、[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]11年（[[869]]）に[[従四位上]]を授けられ、『[[延喜式]]』の[[延喜式神名帳|神名帳]]にも名が見えている。[[平安時代]]の末期、[[屋島の戦い]]の際には、[[那須与一]]が扇の的を射るに当たり、「南無[[八幡大菩薩]]、別しては吾が国の神明、[[日光二荒山神社|日光権現]][[宇都宮二荒山神社|宇都宮]]、那須温泉大明神、願わくはあの扇の真中射させてたばえ給え」と那須温泉神社を祈願して見事に扇を射たため、与一は名声を轟かして、[[那須郡]]の総領となり、凱旋の後その神恩の深いことを謝して、大社殿を寄進し、鏑矢、蟇目矢、征矢、桧扇、鳥居を奉納した。領民はこぞって温泉神社を勧請し、[[貞享]]3年（[[1686]]）6月19日には[[正一位]]に叙せられた<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url= http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ |title= 宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=那須温泉神社 |accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref>。与一にあやかり、必勝祈願に訪れる人が多い<ref name="jre"/>。
境内には、与一が奉献した三之鳥居、[[水琴窟]]、[[さざれ石]]などがある<ref name="jre"/>。
神社後方には、[[玉藻前]]が石化したものであると伝わる[[殺生石]]がある{{要出典|date=2022年3月}}。
== 境内社 == : '''愛宕社''' 祭神 - [[カグツチ|火産霊命]] : '''見立神社''' 祭神 - [[天児屋命|天児屋根命]]、狩野三郎行広 : '''祖霊社''' : '''琴平神社''' : '''疱瘡神社''' : '''神明社''' : '''山神社''' : '''稚祇神社''' : '''天満天神''' 祭神 - [[菅原道真|菅原道真公]] : '''九尾稲荷神社''' 祭神 - [[九尾の狐]]（[[玉藻前]]） <gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|見立神社 File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|祖霊社 File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|九尾稲荷神社 </gallery> == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

{{神社 |名称 = 那須温泉神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = [[File:Nasuyuzen.jpg|250px]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]湯本182 |地図 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|deity = [[大国主|大己貴命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少彦名命]]、[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }} '''那須温泉神社'''（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]の[[神社]]。
== Overview == [[舒明天皇]]の代（在位：[[629]] - [[641]]）の創建と伝わる<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=那須温泉神社（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）|publisher=[[東日本旅客鉄道]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref>。古くは、[[Jōgan]]11年（[[869]]）に[[従四位上]]を授けられ、『[[Engishiki]]』の{{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|lt_ja=神名帳|lt=Jinmyōchō}}にも名が見えている。[[平安時代]]の末期、[[屋島の戦い]]の際には、[[那須与一]]が扇の的を射るに当たり、「南無[[八幡大菩薩]]、別しては吾が国の神明、[[日光二荒山神社|日光権現]][[宇都宮二荒山神社|宇都宮]]、那須温泉大明神、願わくはあの扇の真中射させてたばえ給え」と那須温泉神社を祈願して見事に扇を射たため、与一は名声を轟かして、[[那須郡]]の総領となり、凱旋の後その神恩の深いことを謝して、大社殿を寄進し、鏑矢、蟇目矢、征矢、桧扇、鳥居を奉納した。領民はこぞって温泉神社を勧請し、[[貞享]]3年（[[1686]]）6月19日には[[正一位]]に叙せられた<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url= http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ |title= 宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=那須温泉神社 |accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref>。与一にあやかり、必勝祈願に訪れる人が多い<ref name="jre"/>。
境内には、与一が奉献した三之鳥居、[[水琴窟]]、[[さざれ石]]などがある<ref name="jre"/>。
神社後方には、[[玉藻前]]が石化したものであると伝わる[[殺生石]]がある{{要出典|date=2022年3月}}。
== 境内社 == : '''愛宕社''' 祭神 - [[カグツチ|火産霊命]] : '''見立神社''' 祭神 - [[天児屋命|天児屋根命]]、狩野三郎行広 : '''祖霊社''' : '''琴平神社''' : '''疱瘡神社''' : '''神明社''' : '''山神社''' : '''稚祇神社''' : '''天満天神''' 祭神 - [[菅原道真|菅原道真公]] : '''九尾稲荷神社''' 祭神 - [[九尾の狐]]（[[玉藻前]]） <gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|見立神社 File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|祖霊社 File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|九尾稲荷神社 </gallery> == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== See Also == *[[殺生石]] *[[九尾の狐]] *[[玉藻前]]
== External Links == * [http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ 那須温泉神社]

== 境内社 == : '''愛宕社''' 祭神 - [[カグツチ|火産霊命]] : '''見立神社''' 祭神 - [[天児屋命|天児屋根命]]、狩野三郎行広 : '''祖霊社''' : '''琴平神社''' : '''疱瘡神社''' : '''神明社''' : '''山神社''' : '''稚祇神社''' : '''天満天神''' 祭神 - [[Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane公]] : '''九尾稲荷神社''' 祭神 - [[九尾の狐]]（[[玉藻前]]） <gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|見立神社 File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|祖霊社 File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|九尾稲荷神社 </gallery> == References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{脚注ヘルプ}}" to ""
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 那須温泉神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = [[File:Nasuyuzen.jpg|250px]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]湯本182 |地図 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|deity = [[大国主|大己貴命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少彦名命]]、[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }} '''那須温泉神社'''（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]の[[神社]]。
== Overview == [[Emperor Jomei]]の代（在位：[[629]] - [[641]]）の創建と伝わる<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=那須温泉神社（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）|publisher=[[東日本旅客鉄道]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref>。古くは、[[Jōgan]]11年（[[869]]）に[[従四位上]]を授けられ、『[[Engishiki]]』の{{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|lt_ja=神名帳|lt=Jinmyōchō}}にも名が見えている。[[平安時代]]の末期、[[屋島の戦い]]の際には、[[那須与一]]が扇の的を射るに当たり、「南無[[八幡大菩薩]]、別しては吾が国の神明、[[日光二荒山神社|日光権現]][[宇都宮二荒山神社|宇都宮]]、那須温泉大明神、願わくはあの扇の真中射させてたばえ給え」と那須温泉神社を祈願して見事に扇を射たため、与一は名声を轟かして、[[那須郡]]の総領となり、凱旋の後その神恩の深いことを謝して、大社殿を寄進し、鏑矢、蟇目矢、征矢、桧扇、鳥居を奉納した。領民はこぞって温泉神社を勧請し、[[貞享]]3年（[[1686]]）6月19日には[[正一位]]に叙せられた<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url= http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ |title= 宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=那須温泉神社 |accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref>。与一にあやかり、必勝祈願に訪れる人が多い<ref name="jre"/>。
境内には、与一が奉献した三之鳥居、[[水琴窟]]、[[さざれ石]]などがある<ref name="jre"/>。
神社後方には、[[玉藻前]]が石化したものであると伝わる[[殺生石]]がある{{要出典|date=2022年3月}}。
== Sub-shrines == : '''愛宕社''' 祭神 - [[カグツチ|火産霊命]] : '''見立神社''' 祭神 - [[天児屋命|天児屋根命]]、狩野三郎行広 : '''祖霊社''' : '''琴平神社''' : '''疱瘡神社''' : '''神明社''' : '''山神社''' : '''稚祇神社''' : '''天満天神''' 祭神 - [[Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane公]] : '''九尾稲荷神社''' 祭神 - [[九尾の狐]]（[[玉藻前]]） <gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|見立神社 File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|祖霊社 File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|九尾稲荷神社 </gallery> == References ==
{{Reflist}}

境内には、与一が奉献した三之鳥居、[[水琴窟]]、[[さざれ石]]などがある<ref name="jre"/>。
神社後方には、[[玉藻前]]が石化したものであると伝わる[[殺生石]]がある{{要出典|date=2022年3月}}。
== Sub-shrines == : '''愛宕社''' 祭神 - [[カグツチ|火産霊命]] : '''見立神社''' 祭神 - [[天児屋命|天児屋根命]]、狩野三郎行広 : '''祖霊社''' : '''琴平神社''' : '''疱瘡神社''' : '''神明社''' : '''山神社''' : '''稚祇神社''' : '''天満天神''' 祭神 - [[Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane公]] : '''九尾稲荷神社''' 祭神 - [[九尾の狐]]（[[玉藻前]]） <gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|見立神社 File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|祖霊社 File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|九尾稲荷神社 </gallery> == References ==

== Sub-shrines == : '''愛宕社''' 祭神 - [[カグツチ|火産霊命]] : '''見立神社''' 祭神 - [[天児屋命|天児屋根命]]、狩野三郎行広 : '''祖霊社''' : '''琴平神社''' : '''疱瘡神社''' : '''神明社''' : '''山神社''' : '''稚祇神社''' : '''天満天神''' 祭神 - [[Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane公]] : '''九尾稲荷神社''' 祭神 - [[九尾の狐]]（[[玉藻前]]） <gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|見立神社 File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|祖霊社 File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|九尾稲荷神社 </gallery> == References ==

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 那須温泉神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = [[File:Nasuyuzen.jpg|250px]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location = [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]湯本182 |地図 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|deity = [[大国主|大己貴命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少彦名命]]、[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type = [[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }} '''那須温泉神社'''（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）は、[[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那須町]]の[[神社]]。
== Overview == [[Emperor Jomei]]の代（在位：[[629]] - [[641]]）の創建と伝わる<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=那須温泉神社（なすゆぜんじんじゃ）|publisher=[[東日本旅客鉄道]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref>。古くは、[[Jōgan]]11年（[[869]]）に[[従四位上]]を授けられ、『[[Engishiki]]』の{{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|lt_ja=神名帳|lt=Jinmyōchō}}にも名が見えている。[[平安時代]]の末期、[[屋島の戦い]]の際には、[[那須与一]]が扇の的を射るに当たり、「南無[[八幡大菩薩]]、別しては吾が国の神明、[[日光二荒山神社|日光権現]][[宇都宮二荒山神社|宇都宮]]、那須温泉大明神、願わくはあの扇の真中射させてたばえ給え」と那須温泉神社を祈願して見事に扇を射たため、与一は名声を轟かして、[[那須郡]]の総領となり、凱旋の後その神恩の深いことを謝して、大社殿を寄進し、鏑矢、蟇目矢、征矢、桧扇、鳥居を奉納した。領民はこぞって温泉神社を勧請し、[[貞享]]3年（[[1686]]）6月19日には[[正一位]]に叙せられた<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url= http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ |title= 宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=那須温泉神社 |accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref>。与一にあやかり、必勝祈願に訪れる人が多い<ref name="jre"/>。
境内には、与一が奉献した三之鳥居、[[水琴窟]]、[[さざれ石]]などがある<ref name="jre"/>。
神社後方には、[[玉藻前]]が石化したものであると伝わる[[殺生石]]がある{{要出典|date=2022年3月}}。
== Sub-shrines == : '''愛宕社''' 祭神 - [[カグツチ|火産霊命]] : '''見立神社''' 祭神 - [[天児屋命|天児屋根命]]、狩野三郎行広 : '''祖霊社''' : '''琴平神社''' : '''疱瘡神社''' : '''神明社''' : '''山神社''' : '''稚祇神社''' : '''天満天神''' 祭神 - [[Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane公]] : '''九尾稲荷神社''' 祭神 - [[九尾の狐]]（[[玉藻前]]） <gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|見立神社 File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|祖霊社 File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|九尾稲荷神社 </gallery> == References ==
{{Reflist}} == See Also == *[[殺生石]] *[[九尾の狐]] *[[玉藻前]]
== External Links == * [http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/ 那須温泉神社]

境内には、与一が奉献した三之鳥居、[[水琴窟]]、[[さざれ石]]などがある<ref name="jre"/>。
神社後方には、[[玉藻前]]が石化したものであると伝わる[[殺生石]]がある{{要出典|date=2022年3月}}。
== 境内社 == : '''愛宕社''' 祭神 - [[カグツチ|火産霊命]] : '''見立神社''' 祭神 - [[天児屋命|天児屋根命]]、狩野三郎行広 : '''祖霊社''' : '''琴平神社''' : '''疱瘡神社''' : '''神明社''' : '''山神社''' : '''稚祇神社''' : '''天満天神''' 祭神 - [[菅原道真|菅原道真公]] : '''九尾稲荷神社''' 祭神 - [[九尾の狐]]（[[玉藻前]]） <gallery widths="200"> ファイル:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|見立神社 ファイル:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|祖霊社 ファイル:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|九尾稲荷神社 </gallery> == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Nasu Yuzen-jinja]][[ja:那須温泉神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q111076400]] Wikidata name: Nasu Yuzen Shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:29, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building |名称 = 那須温泉神社 | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|image = [[File:Nasuyuzen.jpg|250px]] | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|location = [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]][[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]][[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]]湯本182 |地図 = | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|deity = [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ookuninushi]]、[[:en:Sukunabikona|Sukunahikona]]、[[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Hodanbetsu-no-mikoto]] | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|type = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }}
'''Nasu Onsen Shrine''' (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]] located in [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]], [[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]].
== Overview == It is said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Jomei]] (reigned: [[:en:629|629]] – [[:en:641|641]]).<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=Nasu Onsen Shrine (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】)|publisher=[[:en:East Japan Railway Company|East Japan Railway Company]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref> In ancient times, in the 11th year of the {{ill|Jōgan era|ja|上元|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan era|qq=|1=Jōgan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q124344147}} ([[:en:869|869]]), the shrine was awarded the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従四位上|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071127}} and its name appears in the [[:en:Engishiki|Engishiki]]’s {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Jinmyōchō|lt_ja=神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. In the late [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], during the [[:en:Battle of Yashima|Battle of Yashima]], when [[:en:Nasu no Yoichi|Nasu Yoichi]] took aim at the fan’s target, he prayed to Nasu Onsen Shrine, exclaiming, “Namu {{ill|Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja|八幡大菩薩|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡神|1=Hachiman|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q261637}}, and beyond that, the divine spirit of our country, [[:en:Futarasan shrine|Gongen of Nikkō]][[:en:Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|Utsunomiya]], Nasu Onsen Daimyōjin, may you let my arrow strike dead center of that fan.” His successful shot brought him great renown, and he became the head of [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]]; after his triumphant return, in gratitude for the divine favor, he donated a grand shrine building and offered items such as the kabura arrow, the toad-eye arrow, the征矢, a cypress fan, and a torii. The local people collectively enshrined the Onsen Shrine, and on June 19 of the 3rd year of the [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō era]] ([[:en:1686|1686]]), it was conferred the Rank of {{ill|Shoichii|ja|正一位|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoichii|qq=|1=Senior First Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123258}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/|title=宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=Nasu Onsen Shrine|accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref> Following Yoichi’s example, many continue to visit for prayers for certain victory.<ref name="jre"/>
Within the shrine grounds are the three torii contributed by Yoichi, as well as the [[:en:Suikinkutsu|Water Koto Cave]] and the {{ill|Sazare Stone|ja|さざれ石|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sazare Stone|qq=|1=sazare-ishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11267921}}.<ref name="jre"/>
Behind the shrine, there is a [[:en:Sessho-seki|Sesshōseki]] which is said to be the petrified form of [[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]].
== Sub-shrines == : '''Atago Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Kagu-tsuchi|Hikatsuri no Mikoto]] : '''Mitate Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Ame-no-Koyane|Amanoyowane no Mikoto]], Kano Saburō Yukihiro : '''Sorei Shrine''' : '''Kotohira Shrine''' : '''Smallpox Shrine''' : '''Shinmei Shrine''' : '''Mountain Shrine''' : '''Wakaji Shrine''' : '''Tenma Tenjin''' 祭神 - {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|lt=Lord Sugawara|lt_ja=公|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} : '''Nine-tailed Inari Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Nine-tailed fox|Nine-tailed Fox]] ([[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]])
<gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|Mitate Shrine (見立神社) File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|Sorei Shrine (祖霊社) File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|Nine-tailed Inari Shrine (九尾稲荷神社) </gallery>

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Nasu Yuzen-jinja]][[ja:那須温泉神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q111076400]] Wikidata name: Nasu Yuzen Shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:29, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building |名称 = 那須温泉神社 | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|image = [[File:Nasuyuzen.jpg|250px]] | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|location = [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]][[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]][[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]]湯本182 |地図 = | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|deity = [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ookuninushi]]、[[:en:Sukunabikona|Sukunahikona]]、[[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Hodanbetsu-no-mikoto]] | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|type = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }}
'''Nasu Onsen Shrine''' (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]] located in [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]], [[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]].
== Overview == It is said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Jomei]] (reigned: [[:en:629|629]] – [[:en:641|641]]).<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=Nasu Onsen Shrine (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】)|publisher=[[:en:East Japan Railway Company|East Japan Railway Company]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref> In ancient times, in the 11th year of the {{ill|Jōgan era|ja|上元|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan era|1=Jōgan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q124344147}} ([[:en:869|869]]), the shrine was awarded the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従四位上|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071127}} and its name appears in the [[:en:Engishiki|Engishiki]]’s {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Jinmyōchō|lt_ja=神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. In the late [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], during the [[:en:Battle of Yashima|Battle of Yashima]], when [[:en:Nasu no Yoichi|Nasu Yoichi]] took aim at the fan’s target, he prayed to Nasu Onsen Shrine, exclaiming, “Namu {{ill|Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja|八幡大菩薩|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡神|1=Hachiman|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q261637}}, and beyond that, the divine spirit of our country, [[:en:Futarasan shrine|Gongen of Nikkō]][[:en:Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|Utsunomiya]], Nasu Onsen Daimyōjin, may you let my arrow strike dead center of that fan.” His successful shot brought him great renown, and he became the head of [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]]; after his triumphant return, in gratitude for the divine favor, he donated a grand shrine building and offered items such as the kabura arrow, the toad-eye arrow, the征矢, a cypress fan, and a torii. The local people collectively enshrined the Onsen Shrine, and on June 19 of the 3rd year of the [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō era]] ([[:en:1686|1686]]), it was conferred the Rank of {{ill|Shoichii|ja|正一位|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoichii|1=Senior First Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123258}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/|title=宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=Nasu Onsen Shrine|accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref> Following Yoichi’s example, many continue to visit for prayers for certain victory.<ref name="jre"/>
Within the shrine grounds are the three torii contributed by Yoichi, as well as the [[:en:Suikinkutsu|Water Koto Cave]] and the {{ill|Sazare Stone|ja|さざれ石|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sazare Stone|1=sazare-ishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11267921}}.<ref name="jre"/>
Behind the shrine, there is a [[:en:Sessho-seki|Sesshōseki]] which is said to be the petrified form of [[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]].
== Sub-shrines == : '''Atago Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Kagu-tsuchi|Hikatsuri no Mikoto]] : '''Mitate Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Ame-no-Koyane|Amanoyowane no Mikoto]], Kano Saburō Yukihiro : '''Sorei Shrine''' : '''Kotohira Shrine''' : '''Smallpox Shrine''' : '''Shinmei Shrine''' : '''Mountain Shrine''' : '''Wakaji Shrine''' : '''Tenma Tenjin''' 祭神 - {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|lt=Lord Sugawara|lt_ja=公|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} : '''Nine-tailed Inari Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Nine-tailed fox|Nine-tailed Fox]] ([[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]])
<gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|Mitate Shrine (見立神社) File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|Sorei Shrine (祖霊社) File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|Nine-tailed Inari Shrine (九尾稲荷神社) </gallery>

== Sub-shrines == : '''Atago Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Kagu-tsuchi|Hikatsuri no Mikoto]] : '''Mitate Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Ame-no-Koyane|Amanoyowane no Mikoto]], Kano Saburō Yukihiro : '''Sorei Shrine''' : '''Kotohira Shrine''' : '''Smallpox Shrine''' : '''Shinmei Shrine''' : '''Mountain Shrine''' : '''Wakaji Shrine''' : '''Tenma Tenjin''' 祭神 - {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|lt=Lord Sugawara|lt_ja=公|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} : '''Nine-tailed Inari Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Nine-tailed fox|Nine-tailed Fox]] ([[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]])

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Nasu Yuzen-jinja]][[ja:那須温泉神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q111076400]] Wikidata name: Nasu Yuzen Shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:29, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building |名称 = 那須温泉神社 | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|image = [[File:Nasuyuzen.jpg|250px]] | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|location = [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]][[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]][[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]]湯本182 |地図 = | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|deity = [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ookuninushi]]、[[:en:Sukunabikona|Sukunahikona]]、[[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Hodanbetsu-no-mikoto]] | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|type = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }}
'''Nasu Onsen Shrine''' (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]] located in [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]], [[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]].
== Overview == It is said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Jomei]] (reigned: [[:en:629|629]] – [[:en:641|641]]).<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=Nasu Onsen Shrine (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】)|publisher=[[:en:East Japan Railway Company|East Japan Railway Company]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref> In ancient times, in the 11th year of the {{ill|Jōgan era|ja|上元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan era|1=Jōgan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q124344147}} ([[:en:869|869]]), the shrine was awarded the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従四位上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071127}} and its name appears in the [[:en:Engishiki|Engishiki]]’s {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Jinmyōchō|lt_ja=神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. In the late [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], during the [[:en:Battle of Yashima|Battle of Yashima]], when [[:en:Nasu no Yoichi|Nasu Yoichi]] took aim at the fan’s target, he prayed to Nasu Onsen Shrine, exclaiming, “Namu {{ill|Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja|八幡大菩薩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡神|1=Hachiman|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q261637}}, and beyond that, the divine spirit of our country, [[:en:Futarasan shrine|Gongen of Nikkō]][[:en:Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|Utsunomiya]], Nasu Onsen Daimyōjin, may you let my arrow strike dead center of that fan.” His successful shot brought him great renown, and he became the head of [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]]; after his triumphant return, in gratitude for the divine favor, he donated a grand shrine building and offered items such as the kabura arrow, the toad-eye arrow, the征矢, a cypress fan, and a torii. The local people collectively enshrined the Onsen Shrine, and on June 19 of the 3rd year of the [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō era]] ([[:en:1686|1686]]), it was conferred the Rank of {{ill|Shoichii|ja|正一位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoichii|1=Senior First Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123258}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/|title=宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=Nasu Onsen Shrine|accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref> Following Yoichi’s example, many continue to visit for prayers for certain victory.<ref name="jre"/>
Within the shrine grounds are the three torii contributed by Yoichi, as well as the [[:en:Suikinkutsu|Water Koto Cave]] and the {{ill|Sazare Stone|ja|さざれ石|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sazare Stone|1=sazare-ishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11267921}}.<ref name="jre"/>
Behind the shrine, there is a [[:en:Sessho-seki|Sesshōseki]] which is said to be the petrified form of [[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]].
== Sub-shrines == : '''Atago Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Kagu-tsuchi|Hikatsuri no Mikoto]] : '''Mitate Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Ame-no-Koyane|Amanoyowane no Mikoto]], Kano Saburō Yukihiro : '''Sorei Shrine''' : '''Kotohira Shrine''' : '''Smallpox Shrine''' : '''Shinmei Shrine''' : '''Mountain Shrine''' : '''Wakaji Shrine''' : '''Tenma Tenjin''' 祭神 - {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|lt=Lord Sugawara|lt_ja=公|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} : '''Nine-tailed Inari Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Nine-tailed fox|Nine-tailed Fox]] ([[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]])
<gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|Mitate Shrine (見立神社) File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|Sorei Shrine (祖霊社) File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|Nine-tailed Inari Shrine (九尾稲荷神社) </gallery>

== Overview == It is said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Jomei]] (reigned: [[:en:629|629]] – [[:en:641|641]]).<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=Nasu Onsen Shrine (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】)|publisher=[[:en:East Japan Railway Company|East Japan Railway Company]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref> In ancient times, in the 11th year of the {{ill|Jōgan era|ja|上元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan era|1=Jōgan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q124344147}} ([[:en:869|869]]), the shrine was awarded the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従四位上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071127}} and its name appears in the [[:en:Engishiki|Engishiki]]’s {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Jinmyōchō|lt_ja=神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. In the late [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], during the [[:en:Battle of Yashima|Battle of Yashima]], when [[:en:Nasu no Yoichi|Nasu Yoichi]] took aim at the fan’s target, he prayed to Nasu Onsen Shrine, exclaiming, “Namu {{ill|Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja|八幡大菩薩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡神|1=Hachiman|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q261637}}, and beyond that, the divine spirit of our country, [[:en:Futarasan shrine|Gongen of Nikkō]][[:en:Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|Utsunomiya]], Nasu Onsen Daimyōjin, may you let my arrow strike dead center of that fan.” His successful shot brought him great renown, and he became the head of [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]]; after his triumphant return, in gratitude for the divine favor, he donated a grand shrine building and offered items such as the kabura arrow, the toad-eye arrow, the征矢, a cypress fan, and a torii. The local people collectively enshrined the Onsen Shrine, and on June 19 of the 3rd year of the [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō era]] ([[:en:1686|1686]]), it was conferred the Rank of {{ill|Shoichii|ja|正一位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoichii|1=Senior First Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123258}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/|title=宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=Nasu Onsen Shrine|accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref> Following Yoichi’s example, many continue to visit for prayers for certain victory.<ref name="jre"/>
Within the shrine grounds are the three torii contributed by Yoichi, as well as the [[:en:Suikinkutsu|Water Koto Cave]] and the {{ill|Sazare Stone|ja|さざれ石|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sazare Stone|1=sazare-ishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11267921}}.<ref name="jre"/>
Behind the shrine, there is a [[:en:Sessho-seki|Sesshōseki]] which is said to be the petrified form of [[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]].
== Sub-shrines == : '''Atago Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Kagu-tsuchi|Hikatsuri no Mikoto]] : '''Mitate Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Ame-no-Koyane|Amanoyowane no Mikoto]], Kano Saburō Yukihiro : '''Sorei Shrine''' : '''Kotohira Shrine''' : '''Smallpox Shrine''' : '''Shinmei Shrine''' : '''Mountain Shrine''' : '''Wakaji Shrine''' : '''Tenma Tenjin''' 祭神 - {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|lt=Lord Sugawara|lt_ja=公|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} : '''Nine-tailed Inari Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Nine-tailed fox|Nine-tailed Fox]] ([[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]])

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Nasu Yuzen-jinja]][[ja:那須温泉神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q111076400]] Wikidata name: Nasu Yuzen Shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:29, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building |名称 = 那須温泉神社 | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|image = [[File:Nasuyuzen.jpg|250px]] | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|location = [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]][[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]][[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]]湯本182 |地図 = | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|deity = [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ookuninushi]]、[[:en:Sukunabikona|Sukunahikona]]、[[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Hodanbetsu-no-mikoto]] | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|type = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }}
'''Nasu Onsen Shrine''' (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]] located in [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]], [[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]].
== Overview == It is said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Jomei]] (reigned: [[:en:629|629]] – [[:en:641|641]]).<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=Nasu Onsen Shrine (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】)|publisher=[[:en:East Japan Railway Company|East Japan Railway Company]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref> In ancient times, in the 11th year of the {{ill|Jōgan era|ja|上元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan era|1=Jōgan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q124344147}} ([[:en:869|869]]), the shrine was awarded the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従四位上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071127}} and its name appears in the [[:en:Engishiki|Engishiki]]’s {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Jinmyōchō|lt_ja=神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. In the late [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], during the [[:en:Battle of Yashima|Battle of Yashima]], when [[:en:Nasu no Yoichi|Nasu Yoichi]] took aim at the fan’s target, he prayed to Nasu Onsen Shrine, exclaiming, “Namu {{ill|Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja|八幡大菩薩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡神|1=Hachiman|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q261637}}, and beyond that, the divine spirit of our country, [[:en:Futarasan shrine|Gongen of Nikkō]][[:en:Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|Utsunomiya]], Nasu Onsen Daimyōjin, may you let my arrow strike dead center of that fan.” His successful shot brought him great renown, and he became the head of [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]]; after his triumphant return, in gratitude for the divine favor, he donated a grand shrine building and offered items such as the kabura arrow, the toad-eye arrow, the征矢, a cypress fan, and a torii. The local people collectively enshrined the Onsen Shrine, and on June 19 of the 3rd year of the [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō era]] ([[:en:1686|1686]]), it was conferred the Rank of {{ill|Shoichii|ja|正一位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoichii|1=Senior First Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123258}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/|title=宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=Nasu Onsen Shrine|accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref> Following Yoichi’s example, many continue to visit for prayers for certain victory.<ref name="jre"/>
Within the shrine grounds are the three torii contributed by Yoichi, as well as the [[:en:Suikinkutsu|Water Koto Cave]] and the {{ill|Sazare Stone|ja|さざれ石|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sazare Stone|1=sazare-ishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11267921}}.<ref name="jre"/>
Behind the shrine, there is a [[:en:Sessho-seki|Sesshōseki]] which is said to be the petrified form of [[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]].
== Sub-shrines == : '''Atago Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Kagu-tsuchi|Hikatsuri no Mikoto]] : '''Mitate Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Ame-no-Koyane|Amanoyowane no Mikoto]], Kano Saburō Yukihiro : '''Sorei Shrine''' : '''Kotohira Shrine''' : '''Smallpox Shrine''' : '''Shinmei Shrine''' : '''Mountain Shrine''' : '''Wakaji Shrine''' : '''Tenma Tenjin''' 祭神 - {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|lt=Lord Sugawara|lt_ja=公|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} : '''Nine-tailed Inari Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Nine-tailed fox|Nine-tailed Fox]] ([[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]])
<gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|Mitate Shrine (見立神社) File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|Sorei Shrine (祖霊社) File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|Nine-tailed Inari Shrine (九尾稲荷神社) </gallery>

== Sub-shrines == : '''Atago Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Kagu-tsuchi|Hikatsuri no Mikoto]] : '''Mitate Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Ame-no-Koyane|Amanoyowane no Mikoto]], Kano Saburō Yukihiro : '''Sorei Shrine''' : '''Kotohira Shrine''' : '''Smallpox Shrine''' : '''Shinmei Shrine''' : '''Mountain Shrine''' : '''Wakaji Shrine''' : '''Tenma Tenjin''' 祭神 - {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|lt=Lord Sugawara|lt_ja=公|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} : '''Nine-tailed Inari Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Nine-tailed fox|Nine-tailed Fox]] ([[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]])

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Nasu Yuzen-jinja]][[ja:那須温泉神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q111076400]] Wikidata name: Nasu Yuzen Shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:29, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building |名称 = 那須温泉神社 | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|image = [[File:Nasuyuzen.jpg|250px]] | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|location = [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]][[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]][[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]]湯本182 |地図 = | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|deity = [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ookuninushi]]、[[:en:Sukunabikona|Sukunahikona]]、[[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Hodanbetsu-no-mikoto]] | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|type = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }}
'''Nasu Onsen Shrine''' (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]] located in [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]], [[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]].
== Overview == It is said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Jomei]] (reigned: [[:en:629|629]] – [[:en:641|641]]).<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=Nasu Onsen Shrine (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】)|publisher=[[:en:East Japan Railway Company|East Japan Railway Company]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref> In ancient times, in the 11th year of the {{ill|Jōgan era|ja|上元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan era|1=Jōgan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q124344147}} ([[:en:869|869]]), the shrine was awarded the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従四位上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071127}} and its name appears in the [[:en:Engishiki|Engishiki]]’s {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Jinmyōchō|lt_ja=神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. In the late [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], during the [[:en:Battle of Yashima|Battle of Yashima]], when [[:en:Nasu no Yoichi|Nasu Yoichi]] took aim at the fan’s target, he prayed to Nasu Onsen Shrine, exclaiming, “Namu {{ill|Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja|八幡大菩薩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡神|1=Hachiman|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q261637}}, and beyond that, the divine spirit of our country, [[:en:Futarasan shrine|Gongen of Nikkō]][[:en:Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|Utsunomiya]], Nasu Onsen Daimyōjin, may you let my arrow strike dead center of that fan.” His successful shot brought him great renown, and he became the head of [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]]; after his triumphant return, in gratitude for the divine favor, he donated a grand shrine building and offered items such as the kabura arrow, the toad-eye arrow, the征矢, a cypress fan, and a torii. The local people collectively enshrined the Onsen Shrine, and on June 19 of the 3rd year of the [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō era]] ([[:en:1686|1686]]), it was conferred the Rank of {{ill|Shoichii|ja|正一位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoichii|1=Senior First Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123258}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/|title=宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=Nasu Onsen Shrine|accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref> Following Yoichi’s example, many continue to visit for prayers for certain victory.<ref name="jre"/>
Within the shrine grounds are the three torii contributed by Yoichi, as well as the [[:en:Suikinkutsu|Water Koto Cave]] and the {{ill|Sazare Stone|ja|さざれ石|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sazare Stone|1=sazare-ishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11267921}}.<ref name="jre"/>
Behind the shrine, there is a [[:en:Sessho-seki|Sesshōseki]] which is said to be the petrified form of [[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]].
== Sub-shrines == : '''Atago Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Kagu-tsuchi|Hikatsuri no Mikoto]] : '''Mitate Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Ame-no-Koyane|Amanoyowane no Mikoto]], Kano Saburō Yukihiro : '''Sorei Shrine''' : '''Kotohira Shrine''' : '''Smallpox Shrine''' : '''Shinmei Shrine''' : '''Mountain Shrine''' : '''Wakaji Shrine''' : '''Tenma Tenjin''' 祭神 - {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|lt=Lord Sugawara|lt_ja=公|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} : '''Nine-tailed Inari Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Nine-tailed fox|Nine-tailed Fox]] ([[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]])
<gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|Mitate Shrine (見立神社) File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|Sorei Shrine (祖霊社) File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|Nine-tailed Inari Shrine (九尾稲荷神社) </gallery>

'''Nasu Onsen Shrine''' (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]] located in [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]], [[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]].
== Overview == It is said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Jomei]] (reigned: [[:en:629|629]] – [[:en:641|641]]).<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=Nasu Onsen Shrine (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】)|publisher=[[:en:East Japan Railway Company|East Japan Railway Company]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref> In ancient times, in the 11th year of the {{ill|Jōgan era|ja|上元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan era|1=Jōgan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q124344147}} ([[:en:869|869]]), the shrine was awarded the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従四位上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071127}} and its name appears in the [[:en:Engishiki|Engishiki]]’s {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Jinmyōchō|lt_ja=神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. In the late [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], during the [[:en:Battle of Yashima|Battle of Yashima]], when [[:en:Nasu no Yoichi|Nasu Yoichi]] took aim at the fan’s target, he prayed to Nasu Onsen Shrine, exclaiming, “Namu {{ill|Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja|八幡大菩薩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡神|1=Hachiman|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q261637}}, and beyond that, the divine spirit of our country, [[:en:Futarasan shrine|Gongen of Nikkō]][[:en:Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|Utsunomiya]], Nasu Onsen Daimyōjin, may you let my arrow strike dead center of that fan.” His successful shot brought him great renown, and he became the head of [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]]; after his triumphant return, in gratitude for the divine favor, he donated a grand shrine building and offered items such as the kabura arrow, the toad-eye arrow, the征矢, a cypress fan, and a torii. The local people collectively enshrined the Onsen Shrine, and on June 19 of the 3rd year of the [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō era]] ([[:en:1686|1686]]), it was conferred the Rank of {{ill|Shoichii|ja|正一位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoichii|1=Senior First Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123258}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/|title=宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=Nasu Onsen Shrine|accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref> Following Yoichi’s example, many continue to visit for prayers for certain victory.<ref name="jre"/>
Within the shrine grounds are the three torii contributed by Yoichi, as well as the [[:en:Suikinkutsu|Water Koto Cave]] and the {{ill|Sazare Stone|ja|さざれ石|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sazare Stone|1=sazare-ishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11267921}}.<ref name="jre"/>
Behind the shrine, there is a [[:en:Sessho-seki|Sesshōseki]] which is said to be the petrified form of [[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]].
== Sub-shrines == : '''Atago Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Kagu-tsuchi|Hikatsuri no Mikoto]] : '''Mitate Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Ame-no-Koyane|Amanoyowane no Mikoto]], Kano Saburō Yukihiro : '''Sorei Shrine''' : '''Kotohira Shrine''' : '''Smallpox Shrine''' : '''Shinmei Shrine''' : '''Mountain Shrine''' : '''Wakaji Shrine''' : '''Tenma Tenjin''' 祭神 - {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|lt=Lord Sugawara|lt_ja=公|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} : '''Nine-tailed Inari Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Nine-tailed fox|Nine-tailed Fox]] ([[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]])
<gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|Mitate Shrine (見立神社) File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|Sorei Shrine (祖霊社) File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|Nine-tailed Inari Shrine (九尾稲荷神社) </gallery>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Nasu Yuzen-jinja]][[ja:那須温泉神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Nasu Yuzen-jinja]][[ja:那須温泉神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Nasu Yuzen-jinja]][[ja:那須温泉神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q111076400]] Wikidata name: Nasu Yuzen Shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:29, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building |名称 = 那須温泉神社 | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|image = [[File:Nasuyuzen.jpg|250px]] | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|location = [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]][[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]][[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]]湯本182 |地図 = | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|deity = [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ookuninushi]]、[[:en:Sukunabikona|Sukunahikona]]、[[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Hodanbetsu-no-mikoto]] | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|type = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }}
'''Nasu Onsen Shrine''' (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]] located in [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]], [[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]].
== Overview == It is said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Jomei]] (reigned: [[:en:629|629]] – [[:en:641|641]]).<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=Nasu Onsen Shrine (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】)|publisher=[[:en:East Japan Railway Company|East Japan Railway Company]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref> In ancient times, in the 11th year of the {{ill|Jōgan era|ja|上元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan era|1=Jōgan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q124344147}} ([[:en:869|869]]), the shrine was awarded the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従四位上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071127}} and its name appears in the [[:en:Engishiki|Engishiki]]’s {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Jinmyōchō|lt_ja=神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. In the late [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], during the [[:en:Battle of Yashima|Battle of Yashima]], when [[:en:Nasu no Yoichi|Nasu Yoichi]] took aim at the fan’s target, he prayed to Nasu Onsen Shrine, exclaiming, “Namu {{ill|Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja|八幡大菩薩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡神|1=Hachiman|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q261637}}, and beyond that, the divine spirit of our country, [[:en:Futarasan shrine|Gongen of Nikkō]][[:en:Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|Utsunomiya]], Nasu Onsen Daimyōjin, may you let my arrow strike dead center of that fan.” His successful shot brought him great renown, and he became the head of [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]]; after his triumphant return, in gratitude for the divine favor, he donated a grand shrine building and offered items such as the kabura arrow, the toad-eye arrow, the征矢, a cypress fan, and a torii. The local people collectively enshrined the Onsen Shrine, and on June 19 of the 3rd year of the [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō era]] ([[:en:1686|1686]]), it was conferred the Rank of {{ill|Shoichii|ja|正一位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoichii|1=Senior First Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123258}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/|title=宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=Nasu Onsen Shrine|accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref> Following Yoichi’s example, many continue to visit for prayers for certain victory.<ref name="jre"/>
Within the shrine grounds are the three torii contributed by Yoichi, as well as the [[:en:Suikinkutsu|Water Koto Cave]] and the {{ill|Sazare Stone|ja|さざれ石|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sazare Stone|1=sazare-ishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11267921}}.<ref name="jre"/>
Behind the shrine, there is a [[:en:Sessho-seki|Sesshōseki]] which is said to be the petrified form of [[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]].
== Sub-shrines == : '''Atago Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Kagu-tsuchi|Hikatsuri no Mikoto]] : '''Mitate Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Ame-no-Koyane|Amanoyowane no Mikoto]], Kano Saburō Yukihiro : '''Sorei Shrine''' : '''Kotohira Shrine''' : '''Smallpox Shrine''' : '''Shinmei Shrine''' : '''Mountain Shrine''' : '''Wakaji Shrine''' : '''Tenma Tenjin''' 祭神 - {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|lt=Lord Sugawara|lt_ja=公|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} : '''Nine-tailed Inari Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Nine-tailed fox|Nine-tailed Fox]] ([[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]])
<gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|Mitate Shrine (見立神社) File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|Sorei Shrine (祖霊社) File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|Nine-tailed Inari Shrine (九尾稲荷神社) </gallery>

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Nasu Yuzen-jinja]][[ja:那須温泉神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Nasu Yuzen-jinja]][[ja:那須温泉神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Nasu Yuzen-jinja]][[ja:那須温泉神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q111076400]] Wikidata name: Nasu Yuzen Shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:29, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building |名称 = 那須温泉神社 | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|image = [[File:Nasuyuzen.jpg|250px]] | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|location = [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]][[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]][[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]]湯本182 |地図 = | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|deity = [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ookuninushi]]、[[:en:Sukunabikona|Sukunahikona]]、[[:en:Emperor Ōjin|Hodanbetsu-no-mikoto]] | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|type = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = | religious_affiliation = [[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|festival = |神事 = }}
'''Nasu Onsen Shrine''' (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]] located in [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]], [[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]].
== Overview == It is said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Jomei]] (reigned: [[:en:629|629]] – [[:en:641|641]]).<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=Nasu Onsen Shrine (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】)|publisher=[[:en:East Japan Railway Company|East Japan Railway Company]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref> In ancient times, in the 11th year of the {{ill|Jōgan era|ja|上元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan era|1=Jōgan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q124344147}} ([[:en:869|869]]), the shrine was awarded the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従四位上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071127}} and its name appears in the [[:en:Engishiki|Engishiki]]’s {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Jinmyōchō|lt_ja=神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. In the late [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], during the [[:en:Battle of Yashima|Battle of Yashima]], when [[:en:Nasu no Yoichi|Nasu Yoichi]] took aim at the fan’s target, he prayed to Nasu Onsen Shrine, exclaiming, “Namu {{ill|Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja|八幡大菩薩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡神|1=Hachiman|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q261637}}, and beyond that, the divine spirit of our country, [[:en:Futarasan shrine|Gongen of Nikkō]][[:en:Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|Utsunomiya]], Nasu Onsen Daimyōjin, may you let my arrow strike dead center of that fan.” His successful shot brought him great renown, and he became the head of [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]]; after his triumphant return, in gratitude for the divine favor, he donated a grand shrine building and offered items such as the kabura arrow, the toad-eye arrow, the征矢, a cypress fan, and a torii. The local people collectively enshrined the Onsen Shrine, and on June 19 of the 3rd year of the [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō era]] ([[:en:1686|1686]]), it was conferred the Rank of {{ill|Shoichii|ja|正一位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoichii|1=Senior First Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123258}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/|title=宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=Nasu Onsen Shrine|accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref> Following Yoichi’s example, many continue to visit for prayers for certain victory.<ref name="jre"/>
Within the shrine grounds are the three torii contributed by Yoichi, as well as the [[:en:Suikinkutsu|Water Koto Cave]] and the {{ill|Sazare Stone|ja|さざれ石|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sazare Stone|1=sazare-ishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11267921}}.<ref name="jre"/>
Behind the shrine, there is a [[:en:Sessho-seki|Sesshōseki]] which is said to be the petrified form of [[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]].
== Sub-shrines == : '''Atago Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Kagu-tsuchi|Hikatsuri no Mikoto]] : '''Mitate Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Ame-no-Koyane|Amanoyowane no Mikoto]], Kano Saburō Yukihiro : '''Sorei Shrine''' : '''Kotohira Shrine''' : '''Smallpox Shrine''' : '''Shinmei Shrine''' : '''Mountain Shrine''' : '''Wakaji Shrine''' : '''Tenma Tenjin''' 祭神 - {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|lt=Lord Sugawara|lt_ja=公|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} : '''Nine-tailed Inari Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Nine-tailed fox|Nine-tailed Fox]] ([[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]])
<gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|Mitate Shrine (見立神社) File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|Sorei Shrine (祖霊社) File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|Nine-tailed Inari Shrine (九尾稲荷神社) </gallery>

'''Nasu Onsen Shrine''' (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]] located in [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]], [[:en:Nasu, Tochigi|Nasu Town]].
== Overview == It is said to have been founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Jomei]] (reigned: [[:en:629|629]] – [[:en:641|641]]).<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=Nasu Onsen Shrine (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】)|publisher=[[:en:East Japan Railway Company|East Japan Railway Company]]|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref> In ancient times, in the 11th year of the {{ill|Jōgan era|ja|上元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan era|1=Jōgan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q124344147}} ([[:en:869|869]]), the shrine was awarded the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従四位上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071127}} and its name appears in the [[:en:Engishiki|Engishiki]]’s {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Jinmyōchō|lt_ja=神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. In the late [[:en:Heian period|Heian period]], during the [[:en:Battle of Yashima|Battle of Yashima]], when [[:en:Nasu no Yoichi|Nasu Yoichi]] took aim at the fan’s target, he prayed to Nasu Onsen Shrine, exclaiming, “Namu {{ill|Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja|八幡大菩薩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡神|1=Hachiman|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q261637}}, and beyond that, the divine spirit of our country, [[:en:Futarasan shrine|Gongen of Nikkō]][[:en:Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|Utsunomiya]], Nasu Onsen Daimyōjin, may you let my arrow strike dead center of that fan.” His successful shot brought him great renown, and he became the head of [[:en:Nasu District, Tochigi|Nasu District]]; after his triumphant return, in gratitude for the divine favor, he donated a grand shrine building and offered items such as the kabura arrow, the toad-eye arrow, the征矢, a cypress fan, and a torii. The local people collectively enshrined the Onsen Shrine, and on June 19 of the 3rd year of the [[:en:Jōkyō|Jōkyō era]] ([[:en:1686|1686]]), it was conferred the Rank of {{ill|Shoichii|ja|正一位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoichii|1=Senior First Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123258}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/|title=宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=Nasu Onsen Shrine|accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref> Following Yoichi’s example, many continue to visit for prayers for certain victory.<ref name="jre"/>
Within the shrine grounds are the three torii contributed by Yoichi, as well as the [[:en:Suikinkutsu|Water Koto Cave]] and the {{ill|Sazare Stone|ja|さざれ石|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sazare Stone|1=sazare-ishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11267921}}.<ref name="jre"/>
Behind the shrine, there is a [[:en:Sessho-seki|Sesshōseki]] which is said to be the petrified form of [[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]].
== Sub-shrines == : '''Atago Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Kagu-tsuchi|Hikatsuri no Mikoto]] : '''Mitate Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Ame-no-Koyane|Amanoyowane no Mikoto]], Kano Saburō Yukihiro : '''Sorei Shrine''' : '''Kotohira Shrine''' : '''Smallpox Shrine''' : '''Shinmei Shrine''' : '''Mountain Shrine''' : '''Wakaji Shrine''' : '''Tenma Tenjin''' 祭神 - {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|lt=Lord Sugawara|lt_ja=公|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} : '''Nine-tailed Inari Shrine''' 祭神 - [[:en:Nine-tailed fox|Nine-tailed Fox]] ([[:en:Tamamo-no-Mae|Tamamo-no-Mae]])
<gallery widths="200"> File:Nasuyuzen3.jpg|Mitate Shrine (見立神社) File:Nasuyuzen4.jpg|Sorei Shrine (祖霊社) File:Nasuyuzen2.jpg|Nine-tailed Inari Shrine (九尾稲荷神社) </gallery>

'''Nasu Onsen Shrine''' (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shrine}} located in {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|WD=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nasu District, Tochigi|en|Nasu District, Tochigi|WD=Q1203347|lt=Nasu District}}, {{ill|Nasu, Tochigi|en|Nasu, Tochigi|WD=Q636416|lt=Nasu Town}}.
== Overview == It is said to have been founded during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Jomei}} (reigned: {{ill|629|en|629|WD=Q33258|lt=629}} – {{ill|641|en|641|WD=Q31676|lt=641}}).<ref name="jre">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://sightseeing.jrnets.co.jp/detail/spot/4418.html|title=Nasu Onsen Shrine (那須温泉神社【なすゆぜんじんじゃ】)|publisher={{ill|East Japan Railway Company|en|East Japan Railway Company|WD=Q499071|lt=East Japan Railway Company}}|work=観光スポット・イベント情報|accessdate=2022-03-04}}</ref> In ancient times, in the 11th year of the {{ill|Jōgan era|ja|上元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgan era|1=Jōgan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q124344147}} ({{ill|869|en|869|WD=Q23917|lt=869}}), the shrine was awarded the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従四位上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11071127}} and its name appears in the {{ill|Engishiki|en|Engishiki|WD=Q1342448|lt=Engishiki}}’s {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Jinmyōchō|lt_ja=神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. In the late {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period}}, during the {{ill|Battle of Yashima|en|Battle of Yashima|WD=Q2117322|lt=Battle of Yashima}}, when {{ill|Nasu no Yoichi|en|Nasu no Yoichi|WD=Q2625800|lt=Nasu Yoichi}} took aim at the fan’s target, he prayed to Nasu Onsen Shrine, exclaiming, “Namu {{ill|Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja|八幡大菩薩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Great Bodhisattva|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡神|1=Hachiman|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q261637}}, and beyond that, the divine spirit of our country, {{ill|Futarasan shrine|en|Futarasan shrine|WD=Q701927|lt=Gongen of Nikkō}}{{ill|Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|en|Utsunomiya Futarayama Shrine|WD=Q10946254|lt=Utsunomiya}}, Nasu Onsen Daimyōjin, may you let my arrow strike dead center of that fan.” His successful shot brought him great renown, and he became the head of {{ill|Nasu District, Tochigi|en|Nasu District, Tochigi|WD=Q1203347|lt=Nasu District}}; after his triumphant return, in gratitude for the divine favor, he donated a grand shrine building and offered items such as the kabura arrow, the toad-eye arrow, the征矢, a cypress fan, and a torii. The local people collectively enshrined the Onsen Shrine, and on June 19 of the 3rd year of the {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|WD=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō era}} ({{ill|1686|en|1686|WD=Q7664|lt=1686}}), it was conferred the Rank of {{ill|Shoichii|ja|正一位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoichii|1=Senior First Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11123258}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://nasu-yuzen.jp/sp/|title=宗教法人 那須温泉神社|publisher=Nasu Onsen Shrine|accessdate=2022-02-23}}</ref> Following Yoichi’s example, many continue to visit for prayers for certain victory.<ref name="jre"/>
Within the shrine grounds are the three torii contributed by Yoichi, as well as the {{ill|Suikinkutsu|en|Suikinkutsu|WD=Q1196263|lt=Water Koto Cave}} and the {{ill|Sazare Stone|ja|さざれ石|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sazare Stone|1=sazare-ishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11267921}}.<ref name="jre"/>
Behind the shrine, there is a {{ill|Sessho-seki|en|Sessho-seki|WD=Q2616914|lt=Sesshōseki}} which is said to be the petrified form of {{ill|Tamamo-no-Mae|en|Tamamo-no-Mae|WD=Q1327792|lt=Tamamo-no-Mae}}.
== Sub-shrines == : '''Atago Shrine''' 祭神 - {{ill|Kagu-tsuchi|en|Kagu-tsuchi|WD=Q1640658|lt=Hikatsuri no Mikoto}} : '''Mitate Shrine''' 祭神 - {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|en|Ame-no-Koyane|WD=Q2564508|lt=Amanoyowane no Mikoto}}, Kano Saburō Yukihiro : '''Sorei Shrine''' : '''Kotohira Shrine''' : '''Smallpox Shrine''' : '''Shinmei Shrine''' : '''Mountain Shrine''' : '''Wakaji Shrine''' : '''Tenma Tenjin''' 祭神 - {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|lt=Lord Sugawara|lt_ja=公|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} : '''Nine-tailed Inari Shrine''' 祭神 - {{ill|Nine-tailed fox|en|Nine-tailed fox|WD=Q15063121|lt=Nine-tailed Fox}} ({{ill|Tamamo-no-Mae|en|Tamamo-no-Mae|WD=Q1327792|lt=Tamamo-no-Mae}})
